load_config_from_file: load a Config instance from a coder.json file and environment variables using Config.load()
get_global_config: get the global singleton Config instance with get_config() and optionally reload or set a project directory
get_data_directory: get or create the oats data directory at ~/.local/share/oats using get_data_dir()
configure_ai_provider: define an AI provider with ProviderConfig including api_key, base_url, and enabled fields
configure_model_selection: set the active model and provider with ModelConfig using provider_id and model_id fields
